zh.lifeSummary: 當Serlo de Grendon於1158年出生在英國斯塔福爾格林登時，他的父親Serlo de Grendon24歲，母親Margaret FitzRalph23歲。他於大約1202年與Julianna de Whittington在英國英格蘭德比夏爾布拉德利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Serlo de Grendon于1158年出生在英国斯塔福爾格林登时，他的父亲Serlo de Grendon24岁，母亲Margaret FitzRalph23岁。他于大约1202年与Julianna de Whittington在英国英格兰德比夏爾布拉德利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Grendon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Grendon (in Witheridge and in Tavistock, Devon), Grendon (Northants, Warwicks), Grendon Underwood (Bucks), Grendon Bishop, Grendon Warren (Herefs), or Grindon (Durham, Northumb, Staffs).

nameMeanings.name: Serlo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mario, Arturo, Jesus, Luis, Raul, Adan, Adela, Agustin, Azucena, Baldemar, Dalila.  Italian Aldo, Angelo, Carlo, Santo, Vito, Antonio, Carmela, Elvio, Enrico, Franco, Grazia, Mauro.

Italian and Spanish: nickname from Italian and medieval Spanish merlo ‘blackbird’ (from Latin merula). In the Middle Ages this bird seems to have been regarded at times as foolish and gullible, and at other times as cunning and wily. In some cases the surname may have arisen as a metonymic occupational name for a bird catcher. See also Merle 1.

variants.name: Merola
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Carmine, Marco, Sal, Alfonse, Guido, Lorenzo, Pasquale, Salvatore, Antonio, Carlo, Fiore.
Italian (southern): nickname from Neapolitan merula ‘female blackbird’, from Latin merula (see Merlo ).

variants.name: Merli
meanings: Probably a contracted form of Meriel , but also associated with the small class of girls' names derived from birds, since it is identical in form with Old French merle ‘blackbird’ (Latin merula). The name came to public notice in the 1930s with the actress Merle Oberon ( 1911–79 , born Estelle Merle O'Brien Thompson ).

variants.name: Merle
meanings: Probably a contracted form of Meriel , but also associated with the small class of girls' names derived from birds, since it is identical in form with Old French merle ‘blackbird’ (Latin merula). The name came to public notice in the 1930s with the actress Merle Oberon ( 1911–79 , born Estelle Merle O'Brien Thompson ).

variants.name: Merlos
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Fidel, Francisco, Jorge, Juan, Lazaro, Manuel, Miguel, Adelso, Alonso, Ana, Angel, Cesar.
Spanish and Portuguese: from the personal name Merlos (see Merlo ).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Serlo de Grendon was born in 1158, in Grindon, Staffordshire, England, his father, Serlo de Grendon, was 24 and his mother, Margaret FitzRalph, was 23. He married Julianna de Whittington about 1202, in Bradley, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Serlo de Grendon est né en 1158, à Grindon, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Serlo de Grendon, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Margaret FitzRalph, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Julianna de Whittington environ 1202, à Bradley, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

Er hat um 1202 in Bradley, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Julianna de Whittington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

Lui sposato Julianna de Whittington circa 1202, nel Bradley, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Serlo de Grendonが1158年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアグリンドンで生まれた時，父Serlo de Grendonは24歳，母Margaret FitzRalphは23歳であった。約1202年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアブラドリーでJulianna de Whittingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Serlo de Grendon(이)가 1158년 영국 스태퍼드실르 그린던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Serlo de Grendon(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret FitzRalph(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1202년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 브래들리에서 Julianna de Whittington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Serlo de Grendon nasceu em 1158, em Grindon, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Serlo de Grendon, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Margaret FitzRalph, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Julianna de Whittington aproximadamente 1202, em Bradley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Serlo de Grendon родился в 1158 г. в местности гриндон, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Serlo de Grendon было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret FitzRalph, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Julianna de Whittington около 1202 г. в местности брадли, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в его родном городе.
